invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$0.122（ATR止损），或费率Z值转正（轧空失效）。
invalidation.en: Invalidation condition: price breaks below $0.122 (ATR-based stop), or funding Z-score turns positive (squeeze invalidated).

invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$2900（支撑位），或费率转正且价格停滞（挤压失效），或新闻利好被证伪（买入信号无效）。
invalidation.en: Invalidation condition: price breaks below $2900 (support level), or funding turns positive with price stagnation (squeeze invalidated), or news catalyst disproven (buy signal invalid).
